summary: Market Hours Simulator testing complete. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with Simulator Control in Scanner Alerts widget. All scenarios (bullish_momentum, bearish_reversal, range_bound, high_volatility) and intervals (10s, 30s, 1m, 2m) work correctly. Simulated alerts display with 'SIM' badge.

simulator_status_api.details: Returns running state, scenario, interval, alerts_generated, available_scenarios

simulator_start_api.details: Accepts scenario and interval params, starts simulator correctly

simulator_stop_api.details: Stops simulator and updates status to running=false

simulator_generate_api.details: Creates single alert on demand with simulated=true flag

simulator_set_scenario_api.details: Changes scenario successfully, rejects invalid scenarios with 400

simulator_alerts_api.details: Returns all generated alerts with simulated flag

frontend_simulator_control_ui.details: SimulatorControl.jsx renders in Scanner Alerts widget with all controls

frontend_start_button.details: Start button starts simulator and shows 'Running' status badge

frontend_stop_button.details: Stop button stops simulator and reverts to Start button

frontend_settings_panel.details: Settings panel opens/closes on settings button click

frontend_scenario_selection.details: All 4 scenarios displayed and selectable: bullish_momentum, bearish_reversal, range_bound, high_volatility

frontend_generate_alert.details: Generate button creates alert on demand

critical_code_review_comments: SimulatorControl.jsx correctly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Backend simulator.py router properly validates scenario names and returns 400 for invalid scenarios
market_simulator_service.py singleton pattern ensures single simulator instance
Simulated alerts correctly marked with simulated=true flag for UI badge display

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI components verified via Playwright

context_for_next_testing_agent: Market Hours Simulator feature is complete. SimulatorControl.jsx is integrated into RightSidebar.jsx (ScannerResultsWidget) and LiveAlertsPanel.jsx. All simulator API endpoints work correctly: /api/simulator/status, /api/simulator/start, /api/simulator/stop, /api/simulator/generate, /api/simulator/scenarios, /api/simulator/scenario/{name}, /api/simulator/alerts. Frontend shows 'SIM' badge on simulated alerts.
